findings.evidence: `FiniteProduct.lean:75-100` defines the parallel maps and `:188-214`, `:267-342` reproves their API; Mathlib already provides `prod.fst`, `prod.snd`, `prod.hom_ext`, `prod.lift`, `prod.lift_fst`, `prod.lift_snd` at `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Limits/Shapes/BinaryProducts.lean:544-615`, and `biprod.inl`, `biprod.inr`, `biprod.lift`, `biprod.desc`, `biprod.hom_ext`, `biprod.hom_ext'` at `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Limits/Shapes/BinaryBiproducts.lean:519-604`.
findings.fix: Keep only the private/concrete cone data needed to build the instances, and expose downstream lemmas against `Limits.prod.fst`, `Limits.prod.snd`, `Limits.prod.lift`, `Limits.biprod.inl`, `Limits.biprod.inr`, and `Limits.biprod.desc` instead of new public aliases.
findings.issue: `prodFst`, `prodSnd`, `prodLift`, `prodInl`, `prodInr`, `prodDesc`, and their projection/extensionality lemmas duplicate the standard product/biproduct API once `hasBinaryProduct` and `hasBinaryBiproduct` are installed.

summary: The PR now installs the standard categorical product and biproduct instances, but it still publishes a parallel `FGComoduleCat.prod*` API that duplicates the generic `Limits.prod`/`Limits.biprod` surface.
